notes: Main-route shared HUD is not reactive to normal practice store updates.
PracticeSessionPage subscribes only to phase/session/error/isComplete, so successful non-terminal actions may not rerender the page.
PracticePrimaryActionTrigger memoizes the dispatchable action with [adapter], but adapter identity is stable, so the chosen action can remain stale after state changes.
Build, lint, tsc, and the focused practiceDispatch Vitest all passed; the blocker is runtime UI behavior, not compilation.
